current_message: I now prefer window seats for short work trips instead of aisle seats.
description: Phase 7 showed the 0.5B model cannot perform 'X instead of Y' supersession in one sentence — it re-emits the old memory. The platform must contain whatever it proposes; unrelated memory must survive.
notes: Acceptable outcomes: a correct supersession (window active, aisle superseded) OR safe containment (duplicate rejected, aisle unchanged). Both are recorded by proposal-quality metrics; the only hard assertion is that the unrelated cilantro memory survives and no state corruption occurs. Skipped in default offline validation (requires_local_model).
title: Real local model attempts a one-sentence supersession

turns.message: I prefer aisle seats for short work trips.
